data.body:
The article clearly justifies payment of taxes by citing their social utility.

You can't then argue that analysis of "where the money goes" is a "conflation" that is inherently anti-tax. 

If it's valid as a defense, it's open to critique.

"Moving on" or making it "the focus" isn't relevant.

we stayed up late
on those brilliant starlit nights
for lessons
he’d march us out to the field
with a celestial map
and a flashlight
I carried the big blanket
we’d all lay there in awe
to learn the sky
hanging on his every #word
he always had a stash
of Hershey’s kisses
in his pocket

data.body:
Why did DiD spread so much more quickly?

Because it's a drop-in replacement for old panel data methods.

Given adequate within-time variation across cases, some kind of DiD model will likely fit.

Run some tests and boom it's causally identified.

Amazing how easily you can learn counterfactuals 💪
